co-occurrence groups
{# ── Probable causes (only when failure_key was given) ─────────────────────── #} {% if summary.has_failure %}
Probable Root Causes for {{ summary.failure_key }}
{% if summary.cause_count > 0 %} {{ summary.cause_count }} candidates · ranked by lead time ↑ {% endif %}
{% if summary.cause_count == 0 %}
"{{ summary.failure_key }}" was not observed in this window, or had no co-occurring events.
Try a longer duration, lower min_support, or check the key spelling.
{% else %} {% for c in causes %} {% endfor %}
# Event Key Co-occ Jaccard Lead Time
{{ c.rank }} {{ c.co_count }} {{ c.jaccard }}
{# Lead-time bar — width normalized to max lead across all candidates #}
{% if c.is_precursor %}↑{% else %}↓{% endif %} {{ c.lead_label }}
↑ before = probable root cause (fires before the failure) ↓ after = consequence (fires after the failure)
{% endif %}
{% endif %} {# /has_failure #} {# ── Co-occurrence clusters ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── #} {% if clusters.is_empty() %}
No co-occurrence clusters detected. Try lowering the Jaccard threshold or min_support.
{% else %}

Co-occurrence Clusters ({{ summary.cluster_count }})

sorted by cohesion · click any key to run RCA for it
{% for cluster in clusters %}
{# Card header #}
Cluster #{{ cluster.id }} {{ cluster.members.len() }} keys
{{ cluster.cohesion }}
{# Cohesion bar #}
Cohesion {{ cluster.cohesion_pct }}%
{# Support #}
Support: {{ cluster.support }} time buckets
{# Member tags #}
{% for m in cluster.members %} {% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {# /clusters #} {% endif %} {# /n_events > 0 #}
